generated_oml:
instance CranePositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring position of the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CranePositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneVelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring velocity of the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance CranePositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CranePositionSensor
]

instance CraneVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneVelocitySensor
]

instance CranePositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CranePositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBContainer
]

instance CraneVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Velocity data from gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBContainer
]

instance GantryCraneCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model for geometric representation of the gantry crane structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationService
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for dynamic motion simulation of the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationService
]

instance GantrylibModule : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based module for system components"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance TimescaleDBContainer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker containerized TimescaleDB time-series database"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService
]

instance MosquittoBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker containerized Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance GrafanaDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker containerized Grafana visualization service"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal control for crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlAction
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging for system performance tracking"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data visualization for real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation to ensure model accuracy against physical data"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelValidationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection mechanisms to identify and diagnose system anomalies"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDiagnosisInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Processes real-time sensor data to predict crane behavior"
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneBehaviorPredictionInsight
]

instance OptimalControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimal control for crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "System performance tracking through historical data logging"
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of crane operations"
]

instance ModelValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Model accuracy validation against physical data"
]

instance FaultDiagnosisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Diagnosis of system anomalies for fault detection"
]

instance CraneBehaviorPredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Prediction of crane behavior based on sensor data"
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Python program that reads state parameters (position and velocity) from hardware controllers"
]

instance GantryCranePhysicalStructure : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical structure of the lab-scale gantry crane for reproducibility and public availability"
]

instance CraneController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Hardware controller for the gantry crane in cyber-physical system"
]

instance CraneSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system for industrial automation research"
    base:contains GantryCranePhysicalStructure, CraneController, PhysicalCraneInterface
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for crane movement are generated by the Trajectory Generator Service and processed by the Control Application, which sends them to the Physical Crane Interface. The Continuous Validation Service compares executed trajectory measurements against simulations; discrepancies exceeding thresholds trigger operator notifications via the Dashboard. Specific command types, message formats, authentication mechanisms, feedback systems, conflict resolution, and command execution confirmation details are not provided in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system utilizes the C4 Model for architectural description, featuring a context diagram (Figure 2) and six container components: Database for data storage, Dashboard for runtime visualization, Trajectory Generator Service for path planning, Simulation Service for predictive modeling, Continuous Validation Service for real-time validation, and MQTT Broker for inter-service communication via publish-subscribe messaging."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The system employs MQTT for inter-service communication between containers such as the Trajectory Generator, Simulation, and Control Applications. TimescaleDB is used for data storage. Network topology, bandwidth, latency requirements, reliability mechanisms, and security protocols are not detailed in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed on a personal computer (on-premise) with Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard containers containerized using Docker. Python components are bundled into the gantrylib module and installed via pip. Computational and storage requirements, scalability mechanisms, and availability/reliability details beyond the described setup are not specified."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Air Quality Management exemplar complies with the AutomationML standard for digital twin modeling, as indicated in the documentation. Other exemplars do not reference adherence to specific industry standards, utilizing ad-hoc approaches instead."
]
